title: Caribou’s Crew Gives Chase
description: On pages 1–4, this part follows Coribou, Unknown person #1, Caribou, Narrator, Rayleigh, Fake Straw Hat Pirates, Fake Luffy. The core story beat is caribou’s crew gives chase.
scene: The scene centers on caribou’s crew gives chase, with Coribou, Unknown person #1, Caribou, Narrator, Rayleigh, Fake Straw Hat Pirates, Fake Luffy driving the moment.

dialogue.speaker: Coribou
dialogue.text: Big bro dude!! This digging is hard!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Well, O'course it is! This island's basically made outta tree roots!

dialogue.speaker: Caribou
dialogue.text: Forgive us, please!!! Don't bury us alive!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: We'll do anything, just please don't kill us!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: it was our captain...!! He made us do it!! It was all black...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Keeheheheheheheheheheheheheheheheheheheheheheheheheheheheheheheheheheheheheheheheheheheheheheheh!!! Y'see, what we figured... was that if we joined

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: ...to slaughter every last one...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...of that valuable straw hat crew from within!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Cocyanne, I'll be back in

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Stop this, please!! You'll kill him!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Are you... a fruit- user?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I said quit it already!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: WH... Whaaaa AAAa?! A - A logia?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: What about it...?

dialogue.speaker: Rayleigh
dialogue.text: Y'know, I did wonder... whether a guy's looks could really change that much in just two years that straw hat...

dialogue.speaker: Fake Straw Hat Pirates
dialogue.text: But in the end... it just turned out to be some piece- of-shit fake....!!!

dialogue.speaker: Caribou
dialogue.text: You think God will forgive this, Coribou?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Dig-uh... Dig-uh...

dialogue.speaker: Caribou
dialogue.text: That's right... We're gonna bury these fools...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Noooo Ooooo Oooo!!!

dialogue.speaker: Caribou
dialogue.text: hear that, oh mighty lord?! I'm gonna bury these fools for ya!!!

dialogue.speaker: Fake Luffy
dialogue.text: ..but now I've seen the real straw hat luffy...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: ...with my own two eyes...!! kehih!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: As I've told you already...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: ...the situation was insur- mountable.

dialogue.speaker: Rayleigh
dialogue.text: The man who stopped us was the dark king - the same man who once stopped Uncle Kizaru in his tracks. What was I supposed to do against that?

dialogue.speaker: Fake Straw Hat Pirates
dialogue.text: The only ones to escape from the Plaza were the caribou brothers and their crew... along with a number of the fake straw hats.

dialogue.speaker: Fake Straw Hat Pirates
dialogue.text: All the rest of the offenders have been apprehended, but the real straw hats have dealt severe damage to two of the pacifistas.

dialogue.speaker: Rayleigh
dialogue.text: The units were prototypes... the same ones that cornered the straw hats two years ago. Their strength, of course, was the same as back then.

dialogue.speaker: Rayleigh
dialogue.text: It's the straw hats themselves that have changed!! The level of growth they displayed after these two years in hiding is nothing short of incredible!!!

dialogue.speaker: Marines
dialogue.text: You'd better make this nice and clear to marine HQ!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The straw hat pirates are at large once more...!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: gone in the blink of an eye...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: monkey-chan and the others... have all become so strong...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: ...you were watching?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Of course. I'm their fan, remember?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: ...are you... remembering something, perhaps? Ray-san.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Hmm?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I suppose so...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Hehe he...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Hey!! That's some ship you've got.there!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: ..Oh, this? I stole it...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: My house was burned down, so this is where I live now.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I see! What's your name?

dialogue.speaker: Rayleigh
dialogue.text: ...Rayleigh.

summary: Caribou’s Crew Gives Chase. This part advances the crew from their post-timeskip reunion into the undersea route and the first conflicts surrounding Fish-Man Island.
